metadata.name: Estimate Impact of Alternative Minimum Tax (AMT)

description: A high-income taxpayer with significant itemized deductions wants to know if they will be subject to the AMT.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the taxpayer's regular tax liability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the tax under the standard rules.

nodes.task_description: Prepare Form 6251 to calculate the tentative minimum tax by adding back certain deductions (like state and local taxes).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the tax under the AMT system.

nodes.task_description: Compare the regular tax to the tentative minimum tax and advise the client if they owe the higher AMT amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the taxpayer is subject to AMT and explains the reason.
